message:
fix(a11y): add explicit type="button" to all interactive buttons

Add `type="button"` attribute to buttons across 16 components and pages
to prevent unintended form submissions and improve accessibility. Without
an explicit type, buttons inside forms default to `type="submit"`, which
can cause unexpected page reloads. This is a best-practice sweep covering
the command palette, bottom sheet, table of contents, TLDR tool grid,
error boundaries, and all remaining interactive buttons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

             >
